Short CV

Didem Şahin Ceylan graduated from On Dokuz Mayıs University, Faculty of Arts and Sciences, Department of Biology in 2006. After that, she completed her master's degree at the Department of Audiology at the same university. In 2017, she completed Doctor of Philosophy education at Istanbul University Health Sciences Institute Audiology Language and Speech Disorders.
